name: Lake Travis Pawn & Jewlery
description_short: Lake Travis Rolexx and Pawn is a licensed pawnbroker in Austin, TX specializing in firearms and collateral-based loans. FFL Type 2 licensed for pawn transactions involving firearms.
description_long:
Lake Travis Rolexx and Pawn operates as a federally licensed pawnbroker located at 3611 RR 620 North Suite D in Austin, Texas 78734. The business holds an active FFL (Federal Firearms License) Type 2 designation, specifically licensed as a pawnbroker in firearms other than destructive devices, indicating regulatory compliance with federal firearms regulations. The company is listed on Arms Directory, a specialized online platform serving the firearms and 2A community with 72,000+ U.S. business listings.

The business offers pawn services with a focus on firearms and related merchandise. As a Type 2 FFL pawnbroker, they are authorized to accept firearms as collateral, conduct firearms transactions, and provide short-term loans against personal property. The company can be contacted at (512) 266-6517 for inquiries about pawn transactions, valuations, or collateral-based lending.

Lake Travis Rolexx and Pawn distinguishes itself through federal firearms licensing and operation within the specialized Arms Directory ecosystem, which caters specifically to gun enthusiasts and the 2A community. This positions them within a niche market segment rather than as a general-purpose pawnbroker. The business operates in the Austin metropolitan area, competing with other pawn shops including Smart Pawn and Jewelry of Texas LLC, Cash America Pawn locations, and EZPawn.

Limited public information is available—the Arms Directory listing shows no customer reviews and the business has not claimed or updated its profile with detailed service descriptions. Prospective customers should contact directly for current hours, specific inventory, loan terms, interest rates, and collateral acceptance policies. As with all pawn transactions, borrowers should understand the collateral-at-risk nature of pawn loans versus traditional credit products.
address: 3611 Ranch Rd 620 N # D, Austin, TX 78734

pros: Holds active FFL Type 2 license for firearms pawnbroking, indicating federal regulatory compliance
Located in Austin, Texas with established physical address and verifiable contact information
Specializes in firearms pawnbroking, serving a niche market with specific expertise
Listed on Arms Directory platform with 72,000+ business presence, increasing discoverability
Accessible via phone contact (512) 266-6517 for direct customer inquiries
No application or credit check required, as typical with pawn transactions
cons: Business listing unclaimed on Arms Directory with zero customer reviews, limiting transparency
No published information on loan terms, interest rates, fees, or collateral acceptance policies
Firearms licensing indicates specialization may limit general merchandise pawn services
Limited online presence beyond Arms Directory listing; no dedicated website with service details
Collateral-based lending means items are at risk of forfeiture if loans are not repaid on schedule
best_for: Firearms owners seeking short-term loans against guns or shooting equipment as collateral
Austin-area residents needing quick cash via collateral-based pawn loans
2A community members and gun enthusiasts seeking pawn services within their specialized marketplace
diagnosis: Lake Travis Rolexx and Pawn is best for Austin-area firearms owners or general consumers needing immediate cash and willing to pledge personal property or firearms as collateral. The primary caveat is that pawn loans are high-risk for borrowers—failure to repay results in permanent loss of the pledged item, with no recourse. Prospective customers must contact directly for current terms, rates, and policies, as the business has not published this information publicly.
